zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay於1389年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，她的父親David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford30歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland27歲。她於大約1405年與Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1452年11月6日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay于1389年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，她的父亲David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford30岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland27岁。她于大约1405年与Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1452年11月6日在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay was born in 1389, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, was 27. She married Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine about 1405, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 November 1452, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay est née en 1389, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine environ 1405, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1452, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay 1389 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland 27. Sie hat um 1405 in Scotland Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. November 1452 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Elizabeth Lindsayが1389年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawfordは30歳，母Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotlandは27歳であった。約1405年にスコットランドでRobert Erskine 1st Lord Erskineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1452年11月6日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで63歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランにて埋葬された。

ko.Battle of Beauge - Fresnay Le Comte Eure: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보지
ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay(이)가 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 스컷랜드에서 Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1452년 11월 6일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay nasceu em 1389, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine aproximadamente 1405, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1452, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay родилась в 1389 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Lindsay 1st Earl Of Crawford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart Princess of Scotland, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine около 1405 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 ноября 1452 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine aproximadamente 1405, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1452, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
